description: Shared SSH PTY runtime for MCP clients with viewer, input lock, async tracking, and policy rules.
name: io.github.Zw-awa/ssh-session-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Optional explicit path to ssh-session-mcp.config.json when the config is not in the current working directory.
environmentVariables.name: SSH_MCP_CONFIG

environmentVariables.description: Optional runtime instance id used to isolate state across multiple MCP clients or agents.
environmentVariables.name: SSH_MCP_INSTANCE

environmentVariables.description: Viewer HTTP port. Use auto to allocate a free local port, or 0 to disable the browser viewer.
environmentVariables.name: VIEWER_PORT

environmentVariables.description: Optional viewer bind host. Defaults to 127.0.0.1 for local-only browser access.
environmentVariables.name: VIEWER_HOST

environmentVariables.description: Set to true or 1 to automatically open the browser terminal when a session is created.
environmentVariables.name: AUTO_OPEN_TERMINAL

environmentVariables.description: Operation mode. safe blocks risky or unsuitable terminal actions by default, while full allows broader execution.
environmentVariables.name: SSH_MCP_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Set to true or 1 to run a local shell instead of opening a real SSH connection. Useful for demos and offline testing.
environmentVariables.name: SSH_MCP_LOCAL

environmentVariables.description: Set to true or 1 to expose browser-side debug controls intended for demos and local troubleshooting.
environmentVariables.name: SSH_MCP_DEBUG

environmentVariables.description: Legacy single-target SSH host when not using ssh-session-mcp.config.json device profiles.
environmentVariables.name: SSH_HOST

environmentVariables.description: Legacy single-target SSH port when not using ssh-session-mcp.config.json device profiles.
environmentVariables.name: SSH_PORT

environmentVariables.description: Legacy single-target SSH username when not using ssh-session-mcp.config.json device profiles.
environmentVariables.name: SSH_USER

environmentVariables.description: Optional legacy password-based SSH authentication value.
environmentVariables.name: SSH_PASSWORD

environmentVariables.description: Optional path to a local SSH private key file for legacy single-target mode.
environmentVariables.name: SSH_KEY

title: SSH Session MCP
